_comment: Copy this file to config.json. It stays only on your PC (git-ignored). I (the assistant) fill these in — not homework.
_loginUrl_note: The Apna employer sign-in page. You log in here ONCE, by hand. The session is then reused.
_jobsUrl_note: Your Apna 'Jobs' page. The helper also pulls anyone who applied to existing posts (free, no credits).
_databaseSearches_note: The sourcing engine. Each entry is a saved Apna Database search (open Database, search a role + Surat, copy the address bar). The helper opens it, reads the candidate cards, and feeds them in. Confirmed/tuned together on the first real run.
_intervalHours_note: How often to source. 6 = four times a day. Set 0 to run once and exit.
